message:
fix(ci): format tests and ignore gix-date advisory

- Run cargo fmt on dataset_registry.rs for long lines
- Add .cargo/audit.toml to ignore RUSTSEC-2025-0140 (gix-date)
  This is a low-risk transitive dependency issue we can't easily fix
  until vergen-gix updates their gix dependency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+# Security audit configuration
+# https://docs.rs/cargo-audit/latest/cargo_audit/config/index.html
+
+[advisories]
+# Ignore specific advisories that don't affect our use case
+ignore = [
+    # gix-date: Non-utf8 String can be created with TimeBuf::as_str
+    # This is a low-risk issue in a transitive dependency (vergen-gix -> gix).
+    # We don't use gix-date directly and the issue only affects edge cases
+    # with malformed git timestamps. Waiting for vergen-gix to update.
+    # https://rustsec.org/advisories/RUSTSEC-2025-0140
+    "RUSTSEC-2025-0140",
+]
